completed_tasks.name: Fix HKCR sync on production server

decisions.decision: Use AbortController + setTimeout instead of AbortSignal.timeout
decisions.rationale: AbortSignal.timeout was causing fetch failures on server; explicit AbortController with clearTimeout is more robust
curl works but Node.js fetch fails; mimicking curl headers (User-Agent: curl/8.0, Accept: */*) resolved the issue

decisions.decision: Convert DD-MM-YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD before PostgreSQL insert
decisions.rationale: HK CSV files use DD-MM-YYYY format which PostgreSQL cannot parse

next_action: Phase 999.4 HKCR integration complete. Server has 278,796 HK company records. Next: test UI search for HK companies.
context_notes: Production deployment successful. Sync script created as sync_hkcr.mjs on server, should be deleted after sync. All fixes committed and pushed to GitHub.
